name: BudgetBear
description: BudgetBear is a free budgeting and finance tracking app designed to help you manage your money.

features.title: Expense Tracking
features.desc: Easily track your daily expenses and categorize them for better insights.

features.title: Budget Planning
features.desc: Set monthly budgets and monitor your spending to stay on track.

features.title: Financial Reports
features.desc: Generate detailed reports to analyze your financial habits and make informed decisions.

features.title: iCloud Sync
features.desc: Sync your data across all your Apple devices securely using iCloud.

name: ClipCat
description: Turn any topic into a post-ready TikTok slideshow in seconds. AI-generated hooks, facts, and visuals, all themed and export-ready.

features.title: AI Slide Generation
features.desc: Drop in a topic and get a full slideshow - hook, insights, and image suggestions - generated in seconds.

features.title: Auto Image Matching
features.desc: Every slide gets a high-quality Unsplash image picked to match your content automatically.

features.title: One-Click Themes
features.desc: Choose from clean, luxury, or bold themes to style your slides without touching a single design tool.

features.title: Export & Post
features.desc: Export your slideshow as an image sequence, ready to upload directly to TikTok.

name: Pulse
description: Pulse is a Pomodoro timer app designed to help you boost your productivity and manage your time effectively using the Pomodoro Technique.

features.title: Customizable Timers
features.desc: Set work and break intervals according to your preferences to optimize your productivity.

features.title: Task Management
features.desc: Create and manage tasks to stay organized and focused during your work sessions.

features.title: Productivity Reports
features.desc: Track your productivity over time with detailed reports and insights.

features.title: Focus Mode
features.desc: Minimize distractions with a customizable focus mode that shows just the timer, focused tasks, and a still or animated background.

features.title: Notifications
features.desc: Get notified when your work and break intervals end, so you can stay on track without constantly checking the timer.

features.title: Menu Bar Timer
features.desc: Quickly access and control your Pomodoro timer directly from the menu bar for convenience.

name: Piccy
description: Never chase guests for photos again. Capture every moment with Piccy. No apps, no logins, just pure simplicity.

features.title: Instant Photo Sharing
features.desc: Guests can instantly share photos by scanning a QR code, no app or login required.

features.title: High-Quality Storage
features.desc: Store your photos in high quality without worrying about compression or loss of detail.

features.title: Message Designer
features.desc: Allow guests to leave guestbook messages in various different themes.

features.title: Export all
features.desc: Easily export the entire photo collection in their original high quality.

features.title: Privacy Focused
features.desc: Your photos are private and secure, with no tracking or data collection.

features.title: Gallery View
features.desc: Display all your photos in a beautiful gallery layout during the event.

name: Whirlwind
description: Tailwind Play as a native desktop app, with offline support, project management, local saving, and more.

features.title: Offline Support
features.desc: Work on your TailwindCSS projects without an internet connection.

features.title: Project Management
features.desc: Easily manage multiple TailwindCSS projects within the app.

features.title: Local Saving
features.desc: Save your projects locally on your device for quick access and security.

features.title: Color Picker
features.desc: Quickly select tailwind colors from a built-in color picker tool.

features.title: Gradient Generator
features.desc: Generate and customize gradients for your TailwindCSS projects with ease.

features.title: Monaco editor
features.desc: VS Code editor with syntax highlighting, autocompletion, and error checking for a seamless coding experience.
